data.body: PASS 1 review (T1 — prior-art / novel-architecture justification): no findings. The plan explicitly anchors on the prior art it reinstates (db7b AC5 coverage['metrics']: det_ms/llm_ms/total_ms/llm_calls/claim_path, formerly produced by the retired bespoke orchestrator.run_review) and proposes to reconstruct an equivalent from the workflow recorder step timings / batch_plan coverage rather than reinventing a telemetry scheme. No T1 bright-line fires (no external integration, new dependency, novel architectural pattern, or unverified capability assertion) — this is a well-trodden reinstatement of an established metrics shape. T1 PASSES.
